update: Starting with version 2.9, TensorFlow Enterprise releases are supported for one year. It is recommended that you update regularly to keep your projects within a supported TensorFlow Enterprise version. Previous TensorFlow Enterprise releases that included Long Term Version Support (three years) are still supported for the three-year time period.
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.11 is now available. Note that this TensorFlow Enterprise version does not include  Long Term Version Support .
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.10 is now available. Note that this TensorFlow Enterprise version does not include  Long Term Version Support .

TensorFlow Enterprise 2.9 is now available. Note that this TensorFlow Enterprise version does not include  Long Term Version Support . 
 TensorFlow Enterprise 2.6 has been updated to 2.6.4. 
 TensorFlow Enterprise 2.8 has been updated to 2.8.1.
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.8 is now available and includes  Long Term Version Support .
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.7 is now available with CUDA 11.3 support. Note that this TensorFlow Enterprise version does not include  Long Term Version Support .
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.3 has been updated to 2.3.4 from 2.3.3.
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.5 Deep Learning VM images and Deep Learning Containers are now deprecated.
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.6 is now available and includes  Long Term Version Support .

TensorFlow Enterprise 2.3 has been updated to 2.3.3 from 2.3.2 
 TensorFlow Enterprise 2.1 has been updated to 2.1.4 from 2.1.3
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.5 is now available. Note that this TensorFlow Enterprise version does not include  Long Term Version Support .
TensorFlow Enterprise 2.3 has been updated to  2.3.1  from 2.3.0.

TensorFlow Enterprise  2.1 is now available and ready to use  with AI Platform Notebooks ,  in an AI Platform Deep Learning VM Image instance , and  in an AI Platform Deep Learning Containers instance .

TensorFlow Enterprise  is now available. TensorFlow Enterprise is a distribution of  TensorFlow  that has been optimized to run on Google Cloud, with  Long Term Version Support . 
 Visit the  TensorFlow Enterprise overview  to learn more, or get started  using TensorFlow Enterprise with AI Platform Deep Learning VM Image, AI Platform Notebooks, and AI Platform Deep Learning Containers .
